context.projectOverview: Sprint 7 opens Tier 2 (careful-flow multi-mode). Plumbing-only: install Checkpoint abstraction + 9 call sites invoking a no-op mechanism. Default behavior MUST be unchanged. Sprints 8-10 plug in real mechanisms (CLI/disk/PR) — this sprint installs only the type infrastructure they will use.

completedSprints.title: bober-code-reviewer agent + advisory orchestrator wiring
completedSprints.summary: src/orchestrator/code-reviewer-agent.ts follows curator-agent.ts spawn pattern. code-reviewer-agent.test.ts is COLOCATED in src/orchestrator/ — established convention for sprint 7.

notes: Briefing has 9 exact call-site line ranges, the 10-line pipeline.ts patch shape, module layout, CheckpointOutcome design, and the COLOCATED test HARD CONSTRAINT (src/orchestrator/checkpoints/checkpoints.test.ts, NOT tests/orchestrator/ — see Sprint 5 regression for why). READ THE BRIEFING FIRST.
